title: Define ConfigLoadError variants
scenario: A configuration loader can fail for different reasons. Start with an enum that keeps those reasons programmatic.
instructions: Define ConfigLoadError with MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead variants.

hints.body: Keep the Hierarchical configuration loader errors code active and define ConfigLoadError with MissingEnvironment, InvalidPort, and FileRead variants.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define ConfigLoadError variants is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define ConfigLoadError variants now extends the active Hierarchical configuration loader errors code with config err enum. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
